name: Securonix
description: Integrates with Securonix SNYPR for incident management, threat and violation retrieval, activity event monitoring, and watchlist management via the Securonix REST API

actions.name: Get Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve security incidents from Securonix with optional filtering

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start date for incident retrieval (MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss)

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date for incident retrieval (MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss)

parameters.name: rangeType
parameters.description: Range type filter (updated, created)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by incident status

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Offset for pagination

actions.name: Get Incident Actions
actions.description: Retrieve available actions for an incident

parameters.name: incidentId
parameters.description: Incident ID to retrieve actions for

actions.name: Perform Incident Action
actions.description: Perform an action on an incident (e.g., assign, close, escalate)

parameters.name: incidentId
parameters.description: Incident ID to perform action on

parameters.name: actionName
parameters.description: Name of the action to perform

parameters.name: assignTo
parameters.description: User to assign the incident to (if applicable)

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Spotter query string to search violations

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start time for the query

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End time for the query

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Maximum number of violations to return

actions.name: Search Activity Events
actions.description: Search for activity events in Securonix using Spotter query language

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Spotter query string to search activity events

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start time for the query

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End time for the query

parameters.name: max
parameters.description: Maximum results to return

actions.name: Add to Watchlist
actions.description: Add an entity to a Securonix watchlist

parameters.name: watchlistName
parameters.description: Name of the watchlist to add entity to

parameters.name: entityType
parameters.description: Type of entity (Users, Activityaccount, Resources, Activityip)

parameters.name: entityName
parameters.description: Entity name/identifier to add

parameters.name: expiryDays
parameters.description: Number of days until watchlist entry expires
